Lead Full Stack Engineer

TechGlobal
🇲🇽 Mexico
Published: March 10, 2024
Hybrid
Lead
USD 8,000 - 12,000 / month

About the Role

Join TechGlobal as a Lead Full Stack Engineer. Work with cutting-edge technologies in a fully remote environment across LATAM.

You will lead a team of 5 engineers, architect new services, and contribute to our platform serving 2M+ users.

Requirements

  • 7+ years of software development experience
  • Strong proficiency in Python, Go, or TypeScript
  • Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP)
  • Leadership experience preferred
Python Go TypeScript AWS Docker Kubernetes PostgreSQL Redis
